# CarnageMC

> CarnageMC is a premium Minecraft Lifesteal, PvP, and player-driven economy server for Java and Bedrock, featuring custom enchants, ranked seasons, and weekly events.

CarnageMC runs on Paper 1.21.x with heart-stealing PvP, custom enchantments, a full economy, and community events. Players can apply for staff, read the rules, browse news and changelog, watch live streams, and get support through Discord.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Server overview, IP, and how to join.
- [Features](/features): Gameplay features, custom systems, and mechanics.
- [News](/announcements): Announcements and server updates.
- [Changelog](/changelog): Release notes and gameplay changes.
- [Rules](/rules): Community code of conduct and enforcement rules.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers to common questions about the server.
- [Wiki](/wiki): Guides, mechanics, and reference articles.
- [Community](/community): Community links, socials, and highlights.
- [Events](/events): Upcoming and past server events.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Screenshots and player builds.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Top players by stats and progression.
- [Punishments](/punishments): Public ban, mute, and warning history.
- [Ban Appeals](/appeals): Appeal a punishment.
- [Apply](/apply): Staff applications.
- [Live](/live): Live Twitch stream from the CarnageMC team.
- [Status](/status): Live network status and incident history.
- [Plugins](/plugins): Public server plugins and integrations.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team.
- [Discord](/discord): Join the CarnageMC Discord.

## Optional

- [Install Guide](/install): How to install Minecraft and connect.
- [Release Notes](/release-notes): Detailed patch notes.
- [Quiz](/quiz): Community quizzes and leaderboards.
